_readme: Replace any value below with your real content. Then open db-schema.php and the ch_seed_defaults() function already reads this structure. Status: active = shows on site, inactive = hidden.

reviews.name: Sarah Johnson
reviews.review_text: The freshest cane juice I've ever had in the UK. The ginger blend is absolutely life-changing!

reviews.name: Mohammed Ali
reviews.review_text: Reminds me of home! Pressed live right in front of you. Naturally sweet and refreshing. 10/10.

reviews.name: Emma Wright
reviews.review_text: We hired The Cane House for our wedding — guests loved the live pressing experience!

faqs.question: Do you add any sugar or preservatives?
faqs.answer: No — 100% natural, pressed live from the stalk. The sweetness comes entirely from the natural sugars in the cane itself.

faqs.question: How long does the juice stay fresh?
faqs.answer: Fresh sugarcane juice is best enjoyed immediately after pressing. However, if kept chilled, it can stay fresh for up to 24 hours.

faqs.question: What events can I hire you for?
faqs.answer: We cater for weddings, birthdays, corporate gatherings, festivals, and community events across the UK.

faqs.question: Is your sugarcane juice sustainable?
faqs.answer: Yes! Sugarcane is a highly sustainable crop. Even our leftover fibre (bagasse) is biodegradable.
